title: Seafloor Gardening
description: Makes Spreadable Blocks like Grass Blocks, ignore water.
body:
# Seafloor Gardening
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/aZZIj4fLUng" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

Spreadable blocks (like Grass Blocks) now ignore water that is above them, making them survive and spread underwater. 

This is a Server-Side mod! (still works in singleplayer of course)

## Keep in mind:
**Blocks (for example: Grass Blocks) may need Light to spread, and water reduces light levels!**

So place down some light sources.
